--- Main Page ---
Dave Poe's BBQ - Marietta
map marker pin
660 Whitlock Avenue Southwest, Marietta,  30064
About us
Hello from Dave Poe,
Mindy Hinkson and Zach Poe!
Serving authentic award-winning barbecue, located just west of the square in Marietta, our traditional 19th-century pit-cooked meals create the perfect Art of BBQ Experience!
Read more
about us
Catering
There's No Place Like Dave Poes!
Dave Poe's BBQ specializes in catering corporate events, civic affairs, church gatherings, rehearsal dinners, school functions and events of all types.
Catering
Private parties
Book your next event with us!
Book now
Reviews
review by Yelp
Regina D:
Literally the best bbq on this side of town. Sometimes the chicken breast can be dried out but even with that they have the best Mac and cheese I've ever had and I love their bbq sauce. Gives you a real authentic down south vibe also.
review by Yelp
Kevin B:
Hard to find good BBQ where I live; Dave Poe's was super accommodating when I explained wanting to try out their different options.. great spot!! Reviews don't lie the Mac n cheese was fire!
review by Yelp
Laura C:
Incredibly impressed with Dave Poe's! About a 10 minute drive off the highway in a small strip mall.... definitely worth the drive. I had the beef brisket which was Fan-Freaking-Tastic! So tender and juicy...
review by Yelp
Suzann S:
I love this restaurant. The food is delicious. The mac and cheese is a star of the menu.   We went there for a curbside order and were especially pleased with the COVID precautions Dave's is taking. You just can't beat great food coupled with a caring staff and owner.
review by Yelp
Asia I:
Omg where do I start?! This is the best BBQ restaurant I've had so far in the 9 years I've lived in GA. The ribs, smoked wings, mac & cheese, collard greens, baked beans & potato salad were a-mazing!  I'm totally hooked now...

Dave Poe's BBQ - About

Dot slide navigation number 2

Dot slide navigation number 4
Dot slide navigation number 5
slideshow start stop playing
About us
Hello from Dave Poe,
Mindy Hinkson and Zach Poe!
The staff of Dave Poe's BBQ, located on Whitlock Avenue in Marietta, loaded up their trucks for Washington, DC on July 28 in order to serve their award-winning barbecue to members of the U.S. Senate. Each year, senators have the opportunity to showcase the best food in their states. Last week, Georgia Senator Johnny Isakson bestowed the honor upon David Poe and his crew of barbecue experts. Washington was not disappointed as the Russell building, which houses the senate offices, filled with the mouthwatering aroma of Atlanta's best BBQ. Positive comments floated down the hall as fast as the smell of the hickory-smoked pork. Although the intended guests included senators, military personnel and other officials, passersby flocked to the open doorway just to breathe in the tantalizing fragrance.
When the senators arrived for the luncheon, no one could wait to dig in. As they filled their plates with hand-pulled pork and beef, creamy coleslaw, savory baked beans, one senator was overheard saying, "This barbecue is even better than what we have in my home state." The wonderfully decadent macaroni and cheese was a favorite treat. The cheesy goodness even tempted one diminutive female senator to return for seconds and possibly even thirds. The warm reception Dave Poe's received in the nation's Capitol was also reflected in the 2009 Zagat survey. For the second year running, Dave Poe's earned the highest rating of "Extraordinary to Perfection" and best barbecue in Atlanta. In addition, Dave's was voted as having the "best ribs" in Access Atlanta's "Best of the Big A" survey.
Most locals will not be surprised by the restaurant's positive reputation both here at home and nationally. Dave Poe has been slow smoking competition quality BBQ for the past 34 years. After only a few years in the business, he became the first Grand Champion of the Georgia State BBQ Championship. Since then, Dave has accumulated wins in numerous states up and down the East Coast. He has been preparing legendary slow-smoked, time honored competition barbecue since 1975. At that time, Dave co-founded the family catering business, Stump and Sons. Dave has catered barbecue parties for the majority of the Fortune 500 companies here in the Atlanta area and throughout the Southeast. Over the years, he has fed everyone from Charlie Daniels to Vince Dooley and everyone in between.
Dave Poe's BBQ specializes in catering corporate events, civic affairs, church gatherings, rehearsal dinners, school functions and events of all types. Locals can visit Dave Poe's BBQ at 660 Whitlock Avenue in Marietta to determine their own vote. Additional information is also available by calling
(770)792-2272
or on the web at
davepoes.com
.
